stories.title: Design quality review via Critic agent
stories.i_want: a design critic agent that reviews Phase 04 artifacts for incomplete API specs, inconsistent module patterns, module overlap, validation gaps, missing idempotency, accessibility issues, error taxonomy holes, and data flow bottlenecks
stories.so_that: design defects are caught during Phase 04 before implementation builds on flawed specifications

stories.title: Design improvement via Refiner agent
stories.i_want: a design refiner agent that addresses Critic findings by producing complete OpenAPI contracts, unified error taxonomies, validation rules at every boundary, idempotency keys, and consistent module patterns
stories.so_that: design artifacts improve iteratively through structured debate rather than single-pass creation

stories.title: DEBATE_ROUTING extension for Phase 04
stories.i_want: the DEBATE_ROUTING table in the orchestrator to include a Phase 04 entry mapping to system-designer (Creator), design-critic (Critic), and design-refiner (Refiner)
stories.so_that: Phase 04 debate follows the same generalized protocol as Phase 01 and Phase 03

stories.title: Creator role awareness for system designer
stories.i_want: the system-designer agent to recognize when it is operating as the Creator in a debate loop and include a self-assessment section
stories.so_that: the Critic has explicit uncertainty signals to evaluate rather than having to infer them

stories.title: Debate artifacts stored correctly for Phase 04
stories.i_want: debate artifacts (critique reports, debate summary) to be stored in the correct artifact folder with Phase 04-specific metrics
stories.so_that: the audit trail of design debate rounds is preserved alongside requirements and architecture debate artifacts

stories.title: Robust edge case handling for design debate
stories.i_want: design debate edge cases (missing artifacts, malformed critique, unconverged debate, non-REST interfaces) to be handled gracefully following Article X fail-safe defaults
stories.so_that: the debate loop never blocks the workflow due to infrastructure failures or assumption mismatches
